svg.text: Data Governance Platform — Architecture Diagram (Policy-as-Code PoC)
FastAPI · React/Vite · SQLite · PostgreSQL · Git Contracts · Ollama LLM · 4 Validation Strategies
FRONTEND — React 18 + Vite 5 | Port 3000 | Axios → /api | Zustand State
API GATEWAY — FastAPI 0.109 | /api/v1 | Pydantic v2 validation | uvicorn | Port 8000
SERVICE LAYER — Business Logic | SQLAlchemy ORM | No direct HTTP handling
JSON type for schema fields · created_at / updated_at audit timestamps
back_populates relationships · No business logic in models
POLICY ENGINES + ORCHESTRATION — Prevention at Borders | Validates before publication
ContractAnalysis: risk_level · has_pii · has_sensitive_data · complexity_score · compliance_frameworks
FAST: rule-based only, low risk, no PII | BALANCED: rule + targeted semantic, moderate risk
THOROUGH: full validation, high risk / PII | ADAPTIVE: risk-score auto-select (default)
OrchestrationDecision · estimated_time_seconds · reasoning field · deduplicates results
Metadata storage · JSON column type for flexible schema fields
Auto-initialized on startup via init_db() · Seeded with sample data
Versioned YAML contract files (auto-committed on approval)
Each approval = one Git commit + optional tag
Full diff / history / blame available via git router
Auto-initialized if not a git repo · DO NOT modify manually
Demo database with financial data · governance_user / governance_pass
Tables/columns discovered and imported into governance metadata
Setup: docker-compose up -d · data loaded from demo/setup_postgres.sql
Disabled by default · ollama serve + model pull required
Role pages · Policy pages · Zustand · Axios
Business logic · ORM · No HTTP handling
Ollama LLM · Docker · YAML policies · .env config
Data Governance Platform — Policy-as-Code PoC · Federated governance (UN Peacekeeping model) · Prevention at borders · Generated 2026-03-12
